_meta.purpose: Compatibility and usage metadata overrides for the iContent qtype readiness matrix.
key_rules: Use the same qtype/integration key as qtype_matrix_status.json.
Examples: recordrtc, poodllrecording, cloudpoodll, formulas, gapfill, filter_embedquestion.
Keys beginning with _ are ignored by the renderer and may be used for documentation.

fields.officialsupport: Short label for upstream/offical plugin support status
fields.pluginsites: Integer site count or null when not applicable
fields.notes: Short maintenance/catalog note shown in the matrix

calculated.notes: Core qtype; plugin-directory site counts are not applicable.

calculatedmulti.notes: Core qtype; plugin-directory site counts are not applicable.

calculatedsimple.notes: Core qtype; plugin-directory site counts are not applicable.
